name: OptimizerPlus
description: A Windows-only Geometry Dash performance mod focused on safe runtime behavior and high-performance GPU/process startup tuning.

reduce-particles.name: Reduce Particles
reduce-particles.description: Scale particle counts down before allocation.

particle-density.name: Particle Density
particle-density.description: Percentage of the original particle count to keep.

minimum-particle-count.name: Minimum Particle Count
minimum-particle-count.description: Never reduce a particle system below this many particles.

particle-bucket-size.name: Particle Bucket Size
particle-bucket-size.description: Round particle capacities up to this bucket size.

reduce-glow.name: Throttle Glow Draws
reduce-glow.description: Reduce the frequency of additive glow sprite draws when frame time rises.

reduce-bloom.name: Clamp Bright Opacity
reduce-bloom.description: Clamp very bright sprite opacity values.

optimize-sprites.name: Skip Redundant Visibility Changes
optimize-sprites.description: Avoid repeated visibility updates when the value is unchanged.

lower-texture-quality.name: Quantize Sprite Opacity
lower-texture-quality.description: Round sprite opacity to coarser steps before applying it.

opacity-step.name: Opacity Step
opacity-step.description: Quantization step used for sprite opacity.

cull-transparent-sprites.name: Cull Transparent Sprites
cull-transparent-sprites.description: Skip drawing sprites below the configured opacity threshold. Can affect visuals in some levels.

transparent-opacity-threshold.name: Transparent Sprite Threshold
transparent-opacity-threshold.description: Opacity value at or below which sprites are not drawn.

cull-tiny-sprites.name: Cull Tiny Faded Sprites
cull-tiny-sprites.description: Skip very small, faded sprites that contribute little visually. Can affect visuals in some levels.

tiny-sprite-threshold.name: Tiny Sprite Pixel Threshold
tiny-sprite-threshold.description: Sprites at or below this size can be skipped when faded.

enable-culling.name: Cull Off-Screen Draws
enable-culling.description: Skip sprite and particle draws that are outside the visible area. Can break camera-heavy levels.

offscreen-padding.name: Off-Screen Padding
offscreen-padding.description: Padding around the visible area used for object culling.

reduce-physics.name: Increase Optimization Cadence
reduce-physics.description: Raise the frame cadence used by runtime throttles.

physics-skip.name: Cadence Strength
physics-skip.description: How aggressively runtime throttles spread work across frames.

reduce-position-updates.name: Skip Redundant Position Updates
reduce-position-updates.description: Avoid applying tiny or repeated position changes.

optimize-rotation.name: Skip Redundant Rotation Updates
optimize-rotation.description: Avoid applying tiny or repeated rotation changes.

skip-scale-updates.name: Skip Redundant Scale Updates
skip-scale-updates.description: Avoid applying tiny or repeated scale changes.

skip-color-updates.name: Skip Redundant Color Updates
skip-color-updates.description: Avoid reapplying sprite colors when they are unchanged.

reduce-memory-allocs.name: Bucket Particle Allocations
reduce-memory-allocs.description: Round particle capacities up to fixed buckets to reduce reallocations.

optimize-object-pooling.name: Reuse Particle Capacity
optimize-object-pooling.description: Reuse an existing particle capacity when the requested size stays close.

cache-values.name: Skip Unchanged Values
cache-values.description: Avoid reapplying values when the current value already matches.

reduce-effect-spawning.name: Reduce Effect Spawning
reduce-effect-spawning.description: Further reduce particle-heavy effect systems. Can alter level visuals.

lower-animation-framerate.name: Lower Effect Update Cadence
lower-animation-framerate.description: Lower the update cadence used for particle-heavy effects.

disable-priority-boost.name: Disable Priority Boost
disable-priority-boost.description: Disable Windows priority boosting for the process.

disable-power-throttling.name: Disable Power Throttling
disable-power-throttling.description: Ask Windows not to apply execution-speed throttling to the game process.

raise-timer-resolution.name: Raise Timer Resolution
raise-timer-resolution.description: Request a 1ms multimedia timer resolution for the game process.

aggressive-mode.name: Aggressive Mode
aggressive-mode.description: Apply stronger reductions to particle and glow-heavy paths.

target-fps.name: Target FPS
target-fps.description: Animation interval used for the game director.
